pi_items.source: Verified by inspecting the ReqView ExampleProject where documents/SRS.json has the 'id' field set to 'SRS'.
Verified by reading verifier.py and export_result.sh which hardcode and check for the filename SRS-LITE.json based on this ID.
Verified by reading verifier.py which asserts the new document's 'name' attribute contains this exact string.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh which explicitly injects the 'Log Files' section into the source document, and verifier.py which checks for its absence in the target document.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a ReqView ExampleProject with a verified source document ID of 'SRS'. The environment setup script dynamically injects a synthetic 'Log Files' section into this document. The verification script explicitly requires the newly branched document to have the ID 'SRS-LITE' (saved as SRS-LITE.json), be named 'Lite System Requirements', and successfully have the 'Log Files' section removed while preserving it in the original document.
